templates.title: Morning Meditation
templates.suggested_note: Sit quietly for 10–20 minutes with mindful breathing.

templates.title: Evening Meditation
templates.suggested_note: End the day with calm reflection.

templates.title: Temple Visit
templates.suggested_note: Offer flowers, light incense, or listen to a Dhamma talk.

templates.title: Evening Chanting
templates.suggested_note: Recite Triple Gem, Five Precepts, or Paritta.

templates.title: Review Five Precepts
templates.suggested_note: Reflect on the Panchsheel and renew your commitment.

templates.title: Uposatha Observance
templates.suggested_note: Observe the eight precepts or extra practice on this Uposatha day.

templates.title: Dhamma Reading
templates.suggested_note: Read one teaching or sutta passage.

templates.title: Metta Practice
templates.suggested_note: Practice loving-kindness for yourself and others.
